expectations.text: Queries focus on last 24 hours (not 7 days)
expectations.evidence: Section 1 states 'Changed from the default 7 days to last 24 hours / since yesterday (-1d, startOfDay(-1))'. Queries use 'startOfDay(-1), now()' for time bounds.

expectations.text: Uses a compact standup format (done/doing/blocked or similar)
expectations.evidence: Section 3 shows a compact format with 'Done Since Yesterday', 'Blocked', 'In Progress Today', and 'Up Next' sections, explicitly described as 'the classic 3-question standup format'.

expectations.text: Does NOT use confluence.mjs create-page or update-page
expectations.evidence: Section 4 states: 'No confluence.mjs commands would be invoked at all' and 'Step 5 (Publish) was skipped entirely'.

expectations.text: Presents results directly rather than publishing
expectations.evidence: Section 4 confirms: 'Output is rendered as markdown directly in the conversation (Step 4: "Display the full generated report in markdown format")'.
